buildCommand: pnpm --filter @baydar/db run db:generate && pnpm --filter @baydar/shared run build && pnpm --filter @baydar/web... run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:4000 https://palnet-api.onrender.com https://*.r2.cloudflarestorage.com https://*.r2.dev https://*.sentry.io https://*.ingest.sentry.io
